description: Letter from Sheʾerit to Abū Isḥāq Ibrāhīm al-Talmid. In Judaeo-Arabic. The sender heard from Abū l-Barakāt that the addressee is sick (ḍaʿīf) and is very preoccupied and hopes for a letter with news of his recovery. Abū l-Munā is also anxious for news of the addressee and his wife. The bearer of the letter, Yūsuf, is a friend of the writer, and the addressee is to help him sell the items he has with him. Regards are sent to Abū l-Faraj.
tags: Illness, illness letter 969-1517, illness: du'f, illness: letter norms
